# iA Constructions — Builders & Developers | Hyderabad
> Premium residential and commercial construction company in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. Founded in 2017, iA Constructions delivers RERA-approved 2, 3 & 4 BHK apartments, independent villas, and commercial spaces. Trusted by NRIs across USA, Canada, Australia & UK.

## About
iA Constructions is a Hyderabad-based construction and real estate development company. We specialize in premium residential apartments, independent villas, and commercial building construction. Our services include end-to-end project development, custom construction on client plots, property acquisition, home loan consulting, and government approvals (GHMC permits, borewell permissions).

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2017
- Location: KPHB Colony, Kukatpally, Hyderabad, Telangana 500072
- Phone: +91 91544 50123
- Email: dinesh@iaconstructions.com
- Specialization: Premium apartments, villas, commercial construction
- Service Area: Hyderabad and surrounding areas in Telangana
- RERA Compliant: All projects registered with Telangana State RERA
- NRI Services: End-to-end property solutions for Non-Resident Indians

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://iaconstruction-production.up.railway.app/): Overview of iA Constructions' premium building services
- [Projects](https://iaconstruction-production.up.railway.app/projects): Portfolio of ongoing, completed, and upcoming real estate projects
- [Services](https://iaconstruction-production.up.railway.app/services): Full list of construction, property, and consulting services
- [About Us](https://iaconstruction-production.up.railway.app/about): Company history, milestones, mission, and values
- [Contact](https://iaconstruction-production.up.railway.app/contact): Office location, phone, email, and contact form
- [Client Stories](https://iaconstruction-production.up.railway.app/client-stories): Testimonials and reviews from clients
- [Properties](https://iaconstruction-production.up.railway.app/properties): Browse apartments, villas, and plots for sale

## Services Offered
- Building & Development: G+3 to G+5 residential apartment buildings
- Construction Services: Custom construction on client plots with transparent pricing
- Property Acquisition: Land sourcing, title verification, and due diligence
- Loan Consulting: Home loan assistance with multi-bank rate comparison
- NRI Property Services: End-to-end solutions for overseas Indian investors
- Borewell Permission: GHMC approval assistance
- Building Permits: Construction plan approvals and certificates
- Multi-Level Approvals: G+4 and above building clearances

## Service Area
Hyderabad, Kukatpally, KPHB Colony, Miyapur, Chandanagar, Manikonda, Gachibowli, Kondapur, Madhapur, Bachupally, Nizampet, Telangana, India
